Trip.title: Trip
Trip.description: Represents a generated high-end travel itinerary with local experiences and precise timing.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns the trip.

constraints.description: The constraints and inputs for travel generation.

profile.description: The style, pace, rhythm and budget preferences.

days.description: A collection of day plans containing sequenced activities.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when the trip was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp when the trip was last updated.

/trips/{tripId}.description: Database collection containing the executable itineraries generated for users.
